signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry + Correlation Break
signals.text: USD/JPY at 157.261 testing higher as Trump rejects Iran proposal, elevating Middle East tensions and driving WTI Oil +2.85%. Despite the geopolitical flare-up, the +300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage sustains the bid as JPY safe-haven demand remains absent. USD/JPY vs US 10Y correlation at +0.643 (z=-2.08σ) confirms the JPY safe-haven function is broken; carry dominates until VIX > 25. JPY COT LF net short -61,340 reflects crowded carry positioning vulnerable only to BoJ intervention or acute risk-off.

signals.title: AUD/JPY — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry + Retail
signals.text: AUD/JPY at 113.982 reflects a dominant G8 bilateral theme as JPY underperforms the complex. The +360bp RBA-BoJ carry premium supports the AUD lead while retail sentiment at 85% short diverges from COT LF net long +58,994 (78.3% long). This institutional vs retail divergence at extreme levels suggests retail capitulation risk if price extends higher. AUD strength persists ahead of the 16 Jun RBA meeting where a hike bias remains priced.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short -19,294 (long% 18.5%) shows speculators heavily fading the currency despite a hawkish RBNZ market bias. With the RBNZ next meeting on 27 May signaling a hike bias, the crowded spec short position faces significant unwind risk. Fed 3.75% vs RBNZ 2.25% provides a +150bp USD carry advantage, but the positioning extreme (long% < 20%) suggests the downside is exhausted. Watch for RBNZ hawkishness to trigger a short-squeeze toward 0.6050.

signals.title: USD/CHF — Retail Sentiment Extreme
signals.text: USD/CHF at 0.7782 holding near day lows as retail sentiment reaches an extreme 87% long. This positioning diverges from the COT LF net short -7,392, indicating retail is unsuccessfully attempting to catch a bottom in the pair. Fed 3.75% vs SNB 0.0% provides a +375bp carry cushion for USD, yet price action remains heavy. Retail capitulation and a break of recent lows would confirm a deeper correction despite the carry advantage.
